title: Australian Roast Lamb
description: A classic Australian-inspired roast lamb dish, perfect for a special occasion. The dark roasted lamb is tender and flavorful, with a delicious crust on the outside.
instructions: Season the lamb leg with salt and pepper.
Heat the dark roasted olive oil in a large oven-safe pan over high heat.
Sear the lamb leg for 2 minutes on each side.
Transfer the pan to the preheated oven and roast for 20 minutes.
Reduce oven temperature to 180°C (350°F) and continue roasting for 20 minutes.
Tent the lamb with foil and continue roasting for an additional 10 minutes.
Let the lamb rest for 10 minutes before slicing.
Meanwhile, peel and chop the potatoes, carrots, and onions.
Toss the vegetables with salt, pepper, and a drizzle of dark roasted olive oil.
Roast the vegetables in the oven for 20-25 minutes, or until tender.
Serve the lamb with the roasted vegetables and a side of beef broth.
